description_long: This object depicts a fully equipped police officer dressed in a dark blue tactical uniform with a bulletproof vest and protective gear. The officer wears a black helmet with a transparent face shield, providing facial protection. The uniform includes long sleeves, reinforced gloves, and heavy-duty boots, suitable for urban operations. The tactical vest is outfitted with multiple pouches and equipment, and a utility belt holds additional gear such as a holster and pouches. A visible patch is present on the upper arm, indicating official insignia. The overall appearance suggests readiness for riot control or SWAT operations in urban environments.
description: A heavily equipped police officer in a dark blue tactical uniform, wearing a helmet with a face shield and a gear-laden vest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the helmet with face shield, tactical vest, gloves, and utility belt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the helmet profile, arm patch, and side pouches on the vest and belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the helmet, vest, and additional gear attached to the belt and vest.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the helmet, vest, and holster on the utility belt.
attribute_uniform_type: Dark blue tactical police uniform with long sleeves, reinforced pants, black tactical vest with multiple pouches, gloves, and heavy-duty boots.
attribute_headgear_style: Black tactical helmet with transparent face shield
